name: Initial Setup: Overview
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Proper initial setup ensures your email campaigns reach subscribers' inboxes rather than spam folders, which is essential for campaign effectiveness. Completing DNS configuration, SSL certificates, and IP warm-up processes helps establish sender reputation with email service providers, typically achieving significantly better deliverability rates compared to incomplete setups."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This foundational configuration protects your domain reputation and enables reliable email delivery for your marketing campaigns, helping ensure your messages consistently reach their intended audience and maintain subscriber trust."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Before you can start mailing from your Maropost Marketing Cloud account, you will first need to set up several DNS and email items."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The following are the mandatory setup items:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/957-dns-setup","children":[{"text":"DNS Assignment","bold":true}]},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"","bold":true},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/872-a-record","children":[{"text":"A Record","bold":true}]},{"text":""}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We strongly recommend that you follow a warm-up plan to build your IP/domain reputation. See "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/IP-and-Domain-Generic-Warm-Up","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"IP and Domain Generic Warm Up","bold":true}]},{"text":" to learn more."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If you still need help implementing these setup items, your Customer Success Manager can schedule a call with you to go over them."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Related Articles"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Contact Management:","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/991-application-settings-overview","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Application Settings Overview"}]},{"text":" - Configure your account settings for optimal contact management"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1211-acquisition-overview","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Acquisition Overview"}]},{"text":" - Build your contact database from the start"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Campaign Strategy:","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1721-8-lessons-of-email-marketing-you-can-learn-from-can","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"8 Lessons Of Email Marketing You Can Learn From Can"}]},{"text":" - Best practices for initial email marketing success"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1720-7-best-practices-for-making-the-most-of-an-email-unsubscribe","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"7 Best Practices For Making The Most Of An Email Unsubscribe"}]},{"text":" - Maintain healthy lists from the beginning"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
